title: Agent-to-Agent (A2A) Protocol and Mailbox Transport
interaction_flow: Caller → parseA2AInput(text): parse raw JSON / NDJSON input
parseA2AInput → unwrapAssetFromMessage(item): extract asset from each parsed object
unwrapAssetFromMessage → parseA2AInput: return asset {type, id, ...} or null
parseA2AInput → Caller: return Asset[] (Gene | Capsule | EvolutionEvent)
a2aProtocol → Caller: return {protocol:'gep-a2a', message_type:'publish', message_id:'msg_*', timestamp, payload:{asset_type, local_id, signature}}
Caller → mailboxTransportSend(message): send message via transport
_request → getProxyUrl(): resolve proxy base URL from settings.json
MailboxStore.send → _appendMessage(): generate UUID v7, write to store
Caller → mailboxTransportReceive({type, channel, limit}): poll for messages
ProxyServer → MailboxStore.poll({channel, type, limit}): query messages

key_functions.parseA2AInput(text): Parses raw string (JSON object, JSON array, or NDJSON lines). Calls unwrapAssetFromMessage() on each item. Returns Asset[].
key_functions.unwrapAssetFromMessage(msg): If msg has protocol='gep-a2a' and message_type='publish', extracts payload.asset. If msg is already a plain asset (has type+id), returns as-is. Returns null for unrecognized input.
key_functions.buildMessage({messageType, payload}): Creates envelope: {protocol:'gep-a2a', message_type, message_id:'msg_<uuid>', timestamp, payload}. Throws on invalid messageType.
key_functions.buildHello({name?}): message_type='hello', payload includes env_fingerprint, optional name (max 32 chars).
key_functions.buildPublish({asset}): message_type='publish', requires asset.type + asset.id. Payload: {asset_type, local_id, signature}.
key_functions.buildFetch / buildReport / buildDecision: Typed builders for remaining message types.
key_functions.isValidProtocolMessage(msg): Validates protocol='gep-a2a' + required fields (message_type, message_id, timestamp).
key_functions.mailboxTransportSend(message): Extracts {type: message.message_type||message.type, payload: message.payload||message}. POSTs to /mailbox/send.
key_functions.mailboxTransportReceive(opts): POSTs to /mailbox/poll with {type, channel, limit:20}. Returns data.messages.
key_functions._request(method, path, body): Core HTTP client. Resolves proxyUrl from getProxyUrl(). JSON serialises body. 10s timeout. Resolves parsed JSON response.
key_functions.registerMailboxTransport(): Lazily requires a2aProtocol and calls registerTransport('mailbox', mailboxTransport).
key_functions.sendHeartbeat(): Calls fetch on A2A_HUB_URL. On success, touches/creates EVOLVER_LOGS_DIR/evolver_loop.log.
key_functions.hubOpenEventStream({}): Opens EventSource to A2A_HUB_URL/a2a/events/stream?node_id=<A2A_NODE_ID>. Sends Authorization: Bearer header if A2A_NODE_SECRET set.

key_relationships: mailboxTransport.js depends_on a2aProtocol.js (calls registerTransport at init)
ProxyServer routes.js uses MailboxStore for all /mailbox/* endpoints
MailboxStore persists messages to dataDir filesystem
a2aProtocol.sendHeartbeat talks_to A2AHub via fetch (env: A2A_HUB_URL)
a2aProtocol.hubOpenEventStream talks_to A2AHub via EventSource SSE
mailbox_store_methods: constructor(dataDir) — loads state, mkdir, rebuilds index
writeInbound(msg) — same path as send for inbound direction
poll({type, channel, limit}) — returns queued inbound messages
list({type, limit}) — non-destructive list by type
important_notes: a2aProtocol.js is obfuscated (hex-encoded variable names). API surface inferred from test file.
Transport registration is lazy: registerMailboxTransport() require()-s a2aProtocol at call time to avoid circular deps.
Proxy URL resolved from settings.json at request time via getProxyUrl().
A2A_NODE_SECRET used for both message signing (buildPublish) and SSE auth header.
sendHeartbeat uses global fetch (not _request) — talks directly to A2A hub, not local proxy.
lowerConfidence() in a2a.js marks externally-received assets as 'external_candidate' and applies confidence penalty (default factor 0.6).

env_vars.A2A_HUB_URL: Hub base URL for heartbeat and SSE stream

source_files_analyzed: src/gep/a2aProtocol.js (obfuscated — test file used for API surface)
